hooks.command: bash -c 'f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; [[ "$f" == *"/SKILL.md" ]] && python3 -c "import sys, re; content=open(\"$f\").read(); errors=[]; fields=[\"name\",\"description\",\"version\"]; [errors.append(f) for f in fields if not re.search(f+\":\", content[:500])]; sys.exit(0) if not errors else (print(\"[harness-hook] SKILL.md missing fields:\", errors), sys.exit(0))" 2>/dev/null || true'
